requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 60 Hz, Plug Types A/B/C (INACAL NTP / IEC 62368-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/60Hz，A/B/C型插头（INACAL NTP / IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/60Hz，A/B/C型插頭（INACAL NTP / IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Peru operates on 220 V / 60 Hz mains supply with Type A, B, and C plugs in common use (Type A/B US-style and Type C European-style, no single standard enforced nationally). Electrical safety requirements for consumer electronics and ICT equipment align with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety) as adopted by INACAL as NTP. The IEC 60950-1 predecessor standard has been superseded; new product submissions should reference IEC 62368-1. Electrical safety compliance is required as part of MTC homologación documentation and INDECOPI consumer product oversight.
summary.zh: 秘鲁市电为220V/60Hz，常用A型、B型和C型插头（A/B型为美式，C型为欧式，全国无统一强制插头标准）。消费电子和ICT设备的电气安全要求与INACAL以NTP形式采纳的IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备安全）相对应。前身标准IEC 60950-1已被取代；新产品提交应参照IEC 62368-1。电气安全合规是MTC型式认证文件和INDECOPI消费品监管的要求。
summary.zht: 秘魯市電為220V/60Hz，常用A型、B型和C型插頭（A/B型為美式，C型為歐式，全國無統一強制插頭標準）。消費電子和ICT設備的電氣安全要求與INACAL以NTP形式採納的IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通信技術設備安全）相對應。前身標準IEC 60950-1已被取代；新產品提交應參照IEC 62368-1。電氣安全合規是MTC型式認證文件和INDECOPI消費品監管的要求。

standards_or_laws: Peru mains: 220 V / 60 Hz; plugs: Type A/B/C

summary.en: China's electrical safety standard for ICT and audio/video equipment is GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 60950-1) and transitioning to GB 62368-1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1), both enforced as mandatory through CCC (China Compulsory Certification). China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A and I plugs. The frequency difference (China 50 Hz vs Peru 60 Hz) and plug type differences (China does not use Type B/C widely) must be checked for hardware compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国ICT及音视频设备电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（对应IEC 60950-1）并正在过渡至GB 62368-1（对应IEC 62368-1），均通过CCC（中国强制认证）强制执行。中国市电为220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插头。频率差异（中国50Hz，秘鲁60Hz）及插头类型差异（中国不普遍使用B/C型）须检查硬件兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國ICT及音視頻設備電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（對應IEC 60950-1）並正在過渡至GB 62368-1（對應IEC 62368-1），均通過CCC（中國強制認證）強制執行。中國市電為220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插頭。頻率差異（中國50Hz，秘魯60Hz）及插頭類型差異（中國不普遍使用B/C型）須檢查硬件相容性。

standards_or_laws: China mains: 220 V / 50 Hz; plugs: Type A / I

gap.en: China and Peru share 220 V nominal voltage, which is advantageous, but the frequency differs (China 50 Hz vs Peru 60 Hz) — power adapters and switched-mode supplies rated 100-240 V / 50-60 Hz are compatible, but fixed-frequency designs or motor-driven products must be verified for 60 Hz operation. CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1 / GB 62368-1) is NOT recognised by INDECOPI or MTC in Peru; separate IEC 62368-1 test reports (NTP-aligned) are required for MTC homologación. Plug type must be adapted: Chinese Type A/I plugs are not universally compatible with Type C sockets common in Peru.
gap.zh: 中国和秘鲁均为220V标称电压，具有优势，但频率不同（中国50Hz，秘鲁60Hz）——额定100-240V/50-60Hz的电源适配器和开关电源兼容，但固定频率设计或电机驱动产品须验证60Hz运行。中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）在秘鲁不被INDECOPI或MTC认可；MTC型式认证须提供单独的IEC 62368-1测试报告（NTP标准）。插头类型须适配：中国A型/I型插头与秘鲁常见C型插座并非通用兼容。
gap.zht: 中國和秘魯均為220V標稱電壓，具有優勢，但頻率不同（中國50Hz，秘魯60Hz）——額定100-240V/50-60Hz的電源適配器和開關電源相容，但固定頻率設計或電機驅動產品須驗證60Hz運行。中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）在秘魯不被INDECOPI或MTC認可；MTC型式認證須提供單獨的IEC 62368-1測試報告（NTP標準）。插頭類型須適配：中國A型/I型插頭與秘魯常見C型插座並非通用相容。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory (as part of MTC homologación and INDECOPI consumer product oversight)

source.publisher: INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad del Perú

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 (adopted as NTP by INACAL) is required for wireless and IoT devices sold in Peru. China CCC certification is not recognised. Chinese exporters must confirm power supply compatibility for 220 V / 60 Hz, provide IEC 62368-1 NTP-aligned test reports for MTC homologación, and ensure plug types are suitable for Peru (Type A/B/C). Products designed solely for 50 Hz may require re-engineering for Peru.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62368-1电气安全合规（由INACAL以NTP形式采纳）是秘鲁销售无线及物联网设备的必要条件。中国CCC认证不被认可。中国出口商须确认电源兼容220V/60Hz，为MTC型式认证提供IEC 62368-1 NTP标准测试报告，并确保插头类型适用于秘鲁（A/B/C型）。仅为50Hz设计的产品可能需要针对秘鲁进行重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62368-1電氣安全合規（由INACAL以NTP形式採納）是秘魯銷售無線及物聯網裝置的必要條件。中國CCC認證不被認可。中國出口商須確認電源相容220V/60Hz，為MTC型式認證提供IEC 62368-1 NTP標準測試報告，並確保插頭類型適用於秘魯（A/B/C型）。僅為50Hz設計的產品可能需要針對秘魯進行重新設計。
